testcase.name: test_with_optional_params

failure.message: AssertionError: assert 100.0 <= 52 + where 100.0 = float(100.0) + where 100.0 = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xf90999e6ce40>('daily_organic_waste_kg', 0) + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xf90999e6ce40> = {'annual_savings_inr': 131400, 'annual_waste_diverted_kg': 36500, 'biogas_m3_per_day': 8.0, 'biogas_m3_per_year': 2920, ...}.get
